history.text: Paleo, high protein, low carb, no pickles. A paleo high protein low carb meal without pickles.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Sorry, I don't have a paleo high protein low carb meal without pickles on the menu right now. We have burgers, chicken, wraps, and fries — would you like to try one of those?

history.text: Got it, a Spicy Chicken Wrap. Just so you know, it contains gluten, milk, egg, and soy — not paleo-friendly. How about the Spicy Paneer Wrap instead? It’s high-protein and has no pickles.
